name: Sunday Service
subtitle: Sunday Worship
preMessages: We are happy to have you with us this Sunday morning.
delayedMessages: Please stand by as we prepare for worship.
liveSubmessage: Please join us as worship begins
notices: Welcome to Bull Bay New Testament Church of God. We are glad you are here.
Please prepare your heart and mind for worship.
Kindly silence your phones and other devices.

name: Prayer Meeting
subtitle: Midweek Service
preMessages: Please prepare your heart for prayer.
delayedMessages: We will begin our Prayer Meeting shortly.
liveSubmessage: Let us unite our hearts in prayer.
notices: If you must move, please do so quietly.
Let us maintain reverence as we begin shortly.
